nodes.name: Vilcabamba brushfinch
nodes.summary: The Vilcabamba brushfinch (Atlapetes terborghi) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is endemic to humid Andean forest in the Cordillera Vilcabamba in northwestern Cuzco, Peru. It is sometimes considered a subspecies of the rufous-naped brushfinch. References

nodes.name: Atlapetes
nodes.summary: Atlapetes（Atlapetes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联32种鸟类，如Rufous-capped brushfinch、White-naped brushfinch、Yellow-thighed brushfinch等32种鸟类。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。
